title: Response types in methods/mod.rs missing Clone derive
description: GetResponse<T>, SetResponse<T>, ChangesResponse, QueryResponse, QueryChangesResponse, TypingResponse, AddedItem, SetError, PushSubscriptionSetResponse all only derive Debug + Deserialize. BlobConvertResponse in blob.rs derives Clone. The inconsistency means callers who receive a response and want to pass it to multiple consumers (store + emit an event, cache in AppState, etc.) must manually destructure instead of cloning. Library response types should derive Clone where possible. Fix: add Clone to the derive list on all of these types. The generic T on GetResponse/SetResponse needs T: Clone to conditionally derive Clone — #[derive(Clone)] handles this automatically via the derived bound.
